rationale.R1.5: The artifact has pronounced paragraph-level structural failure: the opening paragraph restates the same methodological claim three times across consecutive sentences, the classifier paragraph self-repeats within a single paragraph, and the evaluation paragraph re-summarizes its own stated numbers in the following sentence. Eliminating this redundancy requires reorganizing the narrative arc within and across paragraphs, not merely polishing individual sentences.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is the load-bearing responsibility. Every paragraph contains egregious sentence-level redundancy (e.g., 'the methodology that we present here addresses this contamination problem' immediately after 'which addresses the well-known false-positive contamination problem'; 'the affine-invariant ensemble sampler that is widely used in the exoplanet community' restating what emcee is after already citing it). Failure to resolve these writing-quality defects would leave the draft unimproved in the most visible and objectively diagnosable dimension.
